expectations.text: Report file is saved as a markdown file at the specified output path
Report identifies or classifies GOLD/Barrick as a commodity producer or miner
Report discusses gold commodity price before or prominently alongside company analysis
expectations.evidence: Dedicated '## Commodity Price Analysis: Gold' section placed before Recommendation and all other analysis

expectations.text: Report mentions AISC (all-in sustaining cost) or production cost/breakeven
expectations.evidence: Q4 2025 AISC $1,581/oz, AISC trend analysis, cost concerns noted

expectations.text: Report explains miner leverage to underlying commodity with quantified amplification
expectations.evidence: 'a 5% gold move = only ~7% margin change' with full '### Commodity Leverage Analysis' table showing 6 gold price scenarios with margin and stock impact

expectations.text: Report contains a Recommendation section with explicit BUY, SELL, or HOLD action
Report contains Conviction level (High, Medium, or Low)
Report has a Valuation Summary section with actual numeric historical averages (not all N/A)
expectations.evidence: P/E Historical: 42.9x (10yr) with note explaining distortion. Forward P/E, P/S, EV/EBITDA show N/A for historical but peer medians present. At least one metric has a historical comparison value.

expectations.text: Report discusses gold price trend or outlook as part of the thesis
expectations.evidence: Full gold price analysis section with spot, YTD performance, drivers, central bank demand, analyst forecasts ($5,000-$6,000+)

expectations.text: Report has a Sources section with references
Recommendation rationale connects back to the gold commodity thesis
expectations.evidence: 'If you're bullish gold, Barrick is one of the best ways to play it' and dedicated user-question-response section

expectations.text: Report calculates explicit per-unit profit margin (spot price minus AISC in $/oz or equivalent)
expectations.evidence: Table showing: Spot Gold ~$5,150/oz - Q4 AISC $1,581/oz = Per-Ounce Margin ~$3,569/oz (69% margin)

expectations.text: Report has a dedicated commodity price section or heading (not just mentioning gold in passing)
expectations.evidence: '## Commodity Price Analysis: Gold' — 40+ line dedicated section with tables, leverage analysis, and AISC trend
